tasks.title: Init Flow 强制项盘点 + MVP 最小必填字段
tasks.description: Inventory create/init forced fields and define MVP minimal required fields (goal_type/experience removed as forced).
tasks.success_criteria: MVP field list + dependency map + compatibility notes.

tasks.title: Init Flow 改造：删除强制项 + 流程/文案同步
tasks.description: Remove forced prompts for goal_type and experience self-rating; ensure create/init succeeds without them.
tasks.success_criteria: Create/init succeeds without goal_type/experience prompt; errors are non-blocking where appropriate.

tasks.title: 冻结 pre_context_v1.3 固定 4 问模板（版本化）
tasks.description: Define and freeze the exact 4 questions for pre_context_v1.3 (options + free text) and ensure it is always asked as 4Q batch.
tasks.success_criteria: Template version = pre_context_v1.3; exactly 4 questions; no banned questions.

tasks.title: 持久化 raw+parsed+provenance（非阻塞解析）+ PRECONTEXT_CAPTURED
tasks.description: Persist pre_context raw(q1-q4) + parsed(optional) + provenance; parsing failures must not block; append PRECONTEXT_CAPTURED event.
tasks.success_criteria: Raw always persisted; template_version/captured_at persisted; capture event appended; flow continues on parse failure.

tasks.title: 偏好摘要回显 + 用户纠错入口（FIELD_SET）
tasks.description: Generate a short preference summary and allow user correction via free text; corrections append FIELD_SET without overwriting raw.
tasks.success_criteria: Corrections update parsed fields, preserve raw evidence, and are traceable via events.

tasks.title: 复用/重问策略：stale/drift/skip cooldown
tasks.description: Implement pre_context gating decisions based on last capture, drift signals, and skip cooldown.
tasks.success_criteria: Stale/drift/skip cooldown behaviors match policies and are testable with injected clock.

tasks.title: 埋点：completion/skip/correction/reuse（init + pre_context）
tasks.description: Emit structured telemetry to compute funnel metrics; include template_version and asked vs reused.
tasks.success_criteria: Metrics can be computed reliably; telemetry contract covered by tests.

hard_constraints: no 2-4 week outcome question in pre_context
correction is evented; raw not overwritten
decisions: DEC-001: experience_level optional/null in schema/validator; init/create does not force prompt
